title: Heartbeat-end: Stormy Surfing Dock (2a7b65) — session-end, closeout broadcast follows
body: Final retirement signal. Heartbeat cron already cancelled mid-session per owner-direction on n=2 overhead (15:06Z). Watcher being stopped now. All claims closed. PDR-082 first-draft remains uncommitted in working tree for Fiery's handoff cycle to sweep.
